studies.title: Impact of alternative exercise technologies on chronic low back pain in back pain patients under special regard of its sustainability.

_verification.reason: The study focuses on the effects of Whole Body-Electromyostimulation (WB-EMS) and Whole Body Vibration (WBV) on chronic back pain, not on the Kaia Rückenschmerzen digital therapeutic product. There is no mention of Kaia or its variations in the study details.

studies.title: BackCare - Digitally supported back training in the home environment

_verification.reason: The study is about a digital intervention for back pain using the Alvie app, not the Kaia Rückenschmerzen product. There is no mention of Kaia or its variations in the study details.

studies.title: Short-term effects of self-myofascial release compared to a conventional mobility exercise and no additional exercise on isometric strength in patients with chronic low-back pain

_verification.reason: The study focuses on the effects of self-myofascial release and conventional mobility exercises on back strength, with no mention of the Kaia Rückenschmerzen product or its specific digital therapeutic intervention.
